headline: Spark Savings contracts catalogued across 6 chains; governance token, vault contracts, and savings mechanisms identified
short_headline: Spark Savings protocol discovered across multichain deployment

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search surfaced Spark USDC vault token (sUSDC) at 0xBc65ad17c5C0a2A4D159fa5a503f4992c7B545FE and SPK governance token at 0xc20059e0317DE91738d13af027DfC4a50781b066 on Ethereum

Official deployments documentation at https://docs.spark.fi/dev/deployments/ references Spark Address Registry GitHub repository (access denied in direct fetch) and Sky Chainlog for multichain addresses

No audit PDFs directly linked from protocol.audit_links (none recorded); audit information available via docs at https://docs.spark.fi/dev/security/security-and-audits with pointers to GitHub audit repositories

GitHub source code repositories identified at https://github.com/sparkdotfi/ pointing to spark-address-registry, sparklend-v1-core, spark-alm-controller, spark-vaults-v2, and other modules; direct fetch blocked but referenced in official docs
Protocol.chains specifies Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Optimism, Unichain; documentation confirms active Savings deployments on Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Unichain, and Gnosis

Savings vaults identified as factory/wrapper around underlying Sky Savings Rate (SSR) contracts; sUSDC, spUSDC, spUSDT, spETH, spPYUSD documented as vault tokens without direct factory enumeration attempted (falls under Sky Protocol control)
Address roles classified: sUSDC as vault token, SPK as governance token, SSR/DSR as underlying yield mechanisms managed by Sky Protocol (not Spark-controlled)

Ethereum addresses verified via Etherscan block explorer; sUSDC proxy detected at 0xBc65ad17c5C0a2A4D159fa5a503f4992c7B545FE with implementation at 0xf943Cb8D5f06f2bBF352878ebEF3Ec5C537A20bA; SPK governance token at 0xc20059e0317DE91738d13af027DfC4a50781b066

rationale.verdict: Discovery phase identifying catalogs of protocol contracts across official documentation and block explorers. Ethereum addresses (sUSDC vault, SPK token) confirmed via Etherscan. GitHub sources (spark-address-registry, audit repositories, code modules) identified but not directly fetched. Official deployments doc references Sky Chainlog and Address Registry for multichain addresses. Savings product wraps Sky-managed SSR/DSR; governance via SPK token. Audit information available through GitHub repositories linked in security docs.

evidence.shows: Spark USDC Vault (sUSDC) token contract on Ethereum Mainnet; ERC-20 proxy with implementation at 0xf943Cb8D5f06f2bBF352878ebEF3Ec5C537A20bA; onchain market cap $165M+
SPK governance token contract on Ethereum; SDAO contract pattern with rely/deny access control; created by Sky Deployer 7
Official deployments documentation page; references Spark Address Registry repository (github.com/sparkdotfi/spark-address-registry) and Sky Chainlog for all smart contract addresses

Savings product documentation describing Spark Savings Vaults V2 (spUSDC, spUSDT, spETH, spPYUSD); legacy vaults (sUSDC, sUSDS, sDAI); describes vault mechanisms and cross-chain deployment on Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Unichain, Gnosis

Security audits documentation; lists audit repositories for SparkLend Core, SparkLend Advanced, Spark ALM Controller, Spark Vaults V2, Spark PSM, XChain Helpers, and Governance Infrastructure; all pointing to GitHub audit folders
Active Immunefi bug bounty program for Spark with up to $5M bounty rewards; link to Immunefi SparkLend program

Protocol overview describing Spark as Star (SubDAO) of Sky; Savings protocol allowing USDS, USDC, DAI deposits across Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, OP Mainnet, Unichain; SPK governance token minted on Ethereum; Spark Liquidity Layer (SLL) deployment details
Main documentation portal describing Spark products: Savings, SparkLend (money market), Spark Liquidity Layer; confirms three main product categories and cross-chain infrastructure

unknowns: D4: GitHub fetch blocked; spark-address-registry repository URL confirmed in docs but content inaccessible via web_fetch tool
D5: Protocol.chains includes Avalanche but no direct Avalanche addresses sourced; verification needed from Sky Chainlog
D6: Savings vault factory enumeration not attempted; Sky Savings Rate (SSR) and Dai Savings Rate (DSR) are Sky Protocol contracts, not Spark-controlled

D1-per-chain: Baseline block-explorer searches not performed for Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Unichain block explorers due to token budget constraints; addresses should be discoverable via Sky Chainlog per official docs

admin_addresses.role: vault (Spark USDC Savings Vault token - sUSDC)

protocol_metadata.about: Spark Savings enables users to deposit stablecoins (USDC, USDS, DAI) across multiple blockchain networks to earn yield through the Sky Savings Rate (SSR) or Dai Savings Rate (DSR). The protocol operates as a SubDAO of Sky, offering vault tokens (sUSDC, spUSDC, spUSDT, spETH, spPYUSD) that represent depositor shares and continuously accrue yield. Spark Liquidity Layer strategically allocates deployed capital across DeFi, CeFi, and RWA protocols to optimize returns while managing risk.
